THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, VIRGIL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 506 FELL STREET #A, S.F. $2,040.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,120.00, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES BY JAN 24, 1996 AND COMPLIES WITH ALL THE OTHER CONDITIONS, THEN PLTF SHALL WAIVE $ 2,120. SEE STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR ADDITIONAL DETAILS.
